Class GLVertexArrayCache

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.impl.gl.element.GLVertexArrayCache
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, NonThrowingAutoCloseable
public class GLVertexArrayCache extends Object implements NonThrowingAutoCloseable
A storage for commonly used vertex arrays.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GLVertexArrayCache()
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    close()
    This method is not expected to throw any checked exceptions.
    GLTransformedVertexArray
    line(float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2)
    Returns a line vertex array between the specified positions.
    List<GLTransformedVertexArray>
    outline(Shape shape)
    Returns path vertex arrays for each subpath of the given Shape for stroking operations.
    GLTransformedVertexArray
    oval(float x, float y, float w, float h)
    Returns an ellipse vertex array enclosed by a rectangle with the specified position and size.
    GLTransformedVertexArray
    rect(float x, float y, float w, float h)
    Returns a rectangle vertex array with the specified position and size.
    GLTransformedVertexArray
    rectImg(float x, float y, float w, float h)
    Returns a rectangle vertex array with the specified position and size for rendering images.
    List<GLTransformedVertexArray>
    triangulate(Shape shape)
    Returns vertex arrays for each subpath of the given Shape for filling operations.

  • Constructor Details

    • GLVertexArrayCache

      public GLVertexArrayCache()

  • Method Details

    • rect

      public GLTransformedVertexArray rect(float x, float y, float w, float h)
      Returns a rectangle vertex array with the specified position and size.
      Parameters:
      x - the origin X coordinate
      y - the origin Y coordinate
      w - the width
      h - the height
      Returns:
      a rectangle VAO

    • rectImg

      public GLTransformedVertexArray rectImg(float x, float y, float w, float h)
      Returns a rectangle vertex array with the specified position and size for rendering images.
      Parameters:
      x - the origin X coordinate
      y - the origin Y coordinate
      w - the width
      h - the height
      Returns:
      a rectangle VAO for images

    • oval

      public GLTransformedVertexArray oval(float x, float y, float w, float h)
      Returns an ellipse vertex array enclosed by a rectangle with the specified position and size.
      Parameters:
      x - the enclosing rectangle's origin X coordinate
      y - the origin Y coordinate
      w - the width
      h - the height
      Returns:
      an ellipse VAO

    • line

      public GLTransformedVertexArray line(float x1, float y1, float x2, float y2)
      Returns a line vertex array between the specified positions.
      Parameters:
      x1 - the first position X coordinate
      y1 - the first position Y coordinate
      x2 - the second position X coordinate
      y2 - the second position Y coordinate
      Returns:
      a line VAO

    • triangulate

      public List<GLTransformedVertexArray> triangulate(Shape shape)
      Returns vertex arrays for each subpath of the given Shape for filling operations.

      For shapes with a united path, the returned list is a singleton.

      Parameters:
      shape - the shape
      Returns:
      VAOs for the given shape, triangulated
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null

    • outline

      public List<GLTransformedVertexArray> outline(Shape shape)
      Returns path vertex arrays for each subpath of the given Shape for stroking operations.

      For shapes with a united path, the returned list is a singleton.

      Parameters:
      shape - the shape
      Returns:
      VAOs for the given shape, representing outlines
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null

    • close

      public void close()
      This method is not expected to throw any checked exceptions.

      After calling this method, this VAO cache must not be used. Idempotent.

      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
      Specified by:
      close in interface NonThrowingAutoCloseable
